scripts.check: node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/lib/config.mjs && node --check server/lib/json-schema.mjs && node --check server/lib/json-store.mjs && node --check app/adapter.mjs && node --check scripts/start-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/probe-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-config.mjs && node --check widget/agent-bridge.js && node --check widget/main.js
scripts.quality: npm run check && npm run validate:config && npm run build && npm test && npm run probe:mcp
